visual_description: A wide shot captures a tense meeting in a modern, sterile-looking office. A man in a white shirt and dark tie stands at the head of a long table, addressing a group of four other men who are seated. The seated men, all in what appear to be police uniforms, are looking at the standing man. The room is enclosed by glass partitions, and a monitor on a stand to the left displays a security camera feed. The floor is tiled in a black and white checkerboard pattern. A watermark with Chinese characters is visible in the upper left corner. The audio features a man speaking in a loud, aggressive, and accusatory tone. His voice is filled with anger and frustration as he confronts someone, speaking rapidly and forcefully. "It's none of your business! Now your people have done something wrong! Otherwise, Superintendent Wong wouldn't have died!" The camera cuts to a close-up of one of the seated men in uniform. He looks up with a concerned and slightly fearful expression, his mouth slightly agape as if he is listening intently or about to speak. The background is a simple, out-of-focus office wall. The same Chinese watermark remains in the upper left. The shot returns to a medium view of the man in the white shirt. He
